Starting sportshub…
Starting…

sportshub

making sports video easy

Stream to GameChanger

If you paste a full URL here, it will be used and the two fields below will be ignored. Both insecure rtmp:// and secure rtmps:// (TLS, usually port 443) are supported.
▶ Watch GC feed

Available cameras

Camera Device Test

Plug in Mevo Start or any USB webcam → click Scan → see actual video here

This uses your browser's native camera access. Works great for Mevo Start in Webcam mode and normal USB webcams on both Windows and Linux.
